insight_events.title: Operating income up 74%

insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Verify the filing extract and reconcile the change with the model and prior period.

insight_events.title: Growth regime downshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime downshift: YoY growth moved to +12.6% to +13.5% YoY (baseline median +17.6% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.summary: Net income growth moved from +30.6% to +226.5% YoY in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

risk_claims.claim: Growth regime downshift: YoY growth moved to +12.6% to +13.5% YoY (baseline median +17.6% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
*Primary risk: Oracle and SAP bundle cloud ERP with existing database relationships, slowing Workday net-new finance logos and forcing price concessions on renewals.
Competitive substitution: Incumbent ERP vendors can undercut on total cost of ownership for dual HCM/finance deals (10-K risk factors).
